query:
SELECT
            (elem->>'installation_id')::bigint as installation_id,
            elem->>'account_id' as account_id,
            elem->>'github_base_url' as github_base_url,
            COALESCE((elem->>'provisioned_by_admin')::bool, false) as "provisioned_by_admin!"
        FROM workspace_settings,
        LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(git_app_installations) AS elem
        WHERE workspace_id = $1
